svg.title: Timesheet auto-escalation workflow
svg.desc: Flowchart showing three escalation tiers for incomplete timesheets: gentle reminder to staff, nudge to line manager, and final alert to HR or senior management.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should the first reminder email say?')
sendPrompt('What should the line manager escalation email contain?')
sendPrompt('What should the HR escalation contain and what are the consequences?')
g.text: Tier 3: Alert to HR / senior management
